data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for expense capture.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the specific need for expense capture related to meals and lodging for out-of-town work. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that directly address this requirement. The only related evidence pertains to general functionality without confirming the specific need for expense capture, leading to an inconclusive status.
gaps: No evidence of expense capture (meals, lodging for out-of-town work) being validated.
